entities.name: GUAR GUM
entities.description: Natural polymer extracted from guar plants used as a base for hydrogels

entities.name: CROSS LINKED GUAR GUM-G-POLY(ACRYLATE) POROUS SUPERABSORBENT HYDROGELS
entities.description: Eco-friendly porous superabsorbent hydrogels prepared by grafting polymerization and cross-linking

entities.name: IN SITU GRAFTING POLYMERIZATION
entities.description: Process used to prepare the superabsorbent hydrogels

entities.name: CROSS-LINKING
entities.description: Process of linking polymer chains to form a network structure

entities.name: N,N-METHYLENE BIS ACRYLAMIDE
entities.description: Chemical agent used as a cross linker in the synthesis of hydrogels

entities.name: FOURIER-TRANSFORM INFRARED SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: Analytical technique used for structural characterization of hydrogels

entities.name: SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPY
entities.description: Imaging technique used for morphological characterization of hydrogels

entities.name: SOLID STATE C13 NMR SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: Spectroscopic technique used for structural characterization of hydrogels

entities.name: POROSITY
entities.description: The measure of void spaces in the hydrogel structure

entities.name: DENSITY
entities.description: The mass per unit volume of the hydrogels

entities.name: SWELLING RATIOS
entities.description: The ability of the hydrogel to absorb and retain fluids in response to stimuli

entities.name: SALT SOLUTIONS
entities.description: External stimulus used to test the swelling behavior of hydrogels

entities.name: FERTILIZER SOLUTIONS
entities.description: External stimulus used to test the swelling behavior of hydrogels

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: External stimulus used to test the swelling behavior of hydrogels

entities.name: PH
entities.description: External stimulus used to test the swelling behavior of hydrogels

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Agricultural chemicals that the hydrogels can carry

entities.name: FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Agricultural nutrients that the hydrogels can carry

entities.name: AGRICULTURALLY IMPORTANT MICROBES
entities.description: Beneficial microorganisms that the hydrogels can carry

entities.name: BIOCONTROL FORMULATIONS
entities.description: Formulations based on hydrogels used for biological control of pests and diseases

entities.name: SHELF-LIFE CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: The stability and longevity of the biocontrol formulations

entities.name: BIOEFFICACY
entities.description: The capacity of the biocontrol formulation to produce a desired biological effect

entities.name: PYTHIUM APHANIDERMATUM
entities.description: Phytopathogenic fungus targeted by the biocontrol formulations
